title: PubMed Literature
description: Biomedical literature search — case reports, signal papers, and PV research

tools.name: search-articles
tools.description: Search PubMed for articles by keyword, MeSH term, or author

parameters.name: article_type
parameters.description: Article type filter (case report, meta-analysis, review)

tools.stub_response: {"status": "stub", "message": "Will query PubMed E-utilities API (esearch + efetch) with structured field mapping."}

tools.name: get-abstract
tools.description: Get article abstract and metadata by PMID

tools.name: get-citations
tools.description: Get articles that cite a given PMID

parameters.name: pmid
parameters.description: PubMed ID to find citations for

tools.name: search-case-reports
tools.description: Search specifically for adverse event case reports for a drug
tools.stub_response: {"status": "stub", "message": "Will search PubMed with filter: (drug_name[Title/Abstract]) AND (case report[Publication Type]) AND (adverse*[Title/Abstract])."}

tools.name: search-signal-literature
tools.description: Find pharmacovigilance signal detection papers for a drug
tools.stub_response: {"status": "stub", "message": "Will search with PV signal terms: (drug) AND (pharmacovigilance OR signal detection OR disproportionality OR PRR OR ROR)."}
